Thus ends the 42nd Ch. entitled EFFECTS OF SUB-PERIODS in Kalyana Varmas SARAVALI.
165

Chapter 43.
Evil Effects Of Dasa
1-4. In the sub period of a malefic planet and in the major period of another malefic, the native will
be troubled by doubts and enemies. It is certain, that death will be inflicted upon the native
though he may have long life indications, in the Dasa of Mars and in the sub period of Saturn.
If a malefic is in the 6th, or the 8th in aspect to another malefic placed in a malefics Sign, death
will come to pass. In the Dasa of a planet, that is inimical to Ascendant Lord and in the sub
period of the Ascendant Lord himself, there may be death, according to Satya.
Thus ends the 43rd Ch. entitled EVIL EFFECTS OF DASAS in Kalyana Varmas SARAVALI.
